'''shozathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atavistic|atavistic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atavistic|atavistic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shozathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozathithi|shozathithi]] || [[word:shozathiji|shozathiji]] || [[word:shozathishi|shozathishi]] || [[word:shozathiki|shozathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozathuthuthu|shozathuthuthu]] || [[word:shozathujuju|shozathujuju]] || [[word:shozathushushu|shozathushushu]] || [[word:shozathukuku|shozathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozathuthu|shozathuthu]] || [[word:shozathuju|shozathuju]] || [[word:shozathushu|shozathushu]] || [[word:shozathuku|shozathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozathufthuf|shozathufthuf]] || [[word:shozathufjuf|shozathufjuf]] || [[word:shozathufshuf|shozathufshuf]] || [[word:shozathufkuf|shozathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozathethe|shozathethe]] || [[word:shozatheje|shozatheje]] || [[word:shozatheshe|shozatheshe]] || [[word:shozatheke|shozatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozathothotho|shozathothotho]] || [[word:shozathojojo|shozathojojo]] || [[word:shozathoshosho|shozathoshosho]] || [[word:shozathokoko|shozathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozathotho|shozathotho]] || [[word:shozathojo|shozathojo]] || [[word:shozathosho|shozathosho]] || [[word:shozathoko|shozathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozathofthof|shozathofthof]] || [[word:shozathofjof|shozathofjof]] || [[word:shozathofshof|shozathofshof]] || [[word:shozathofkof|shozathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfthĂŻf|shozathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfjĂŻf|shozathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfshĂŻf|shozathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfkĂŻf|shozathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shozathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shozathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shozathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shozathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfthĂŻf|shozathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfjĂŻf|shozathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfshĂŻf|shozathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfkĂŻf|shozathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfthĂŻf|shozathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfjĂŻf|shozathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfshĂŻf|shozathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozathĂŻfkĂŻf|shozathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozathĂŠthĂŠ|shozathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shozathĂŠjĂŠ|shozathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shozathĂŠshĂŠ|shozathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shozathĂŠkĂŠ|shozathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozathathatha|shozathathatha]] || [[word:shozathajaja|shozathajaja]] || [[word:shozathashasha|shozathashasha]] || [[word:shozathakaka|shozathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozathatha|shozathatha]] || [[word:shozathaja|shozathaja]] || [[word:shozathasha|shozathasha]] || [[word:shozathaka|shozathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozathafthaf|shozathafthaf]] || [[word:shozathafjaf|shozathafjaf]] || [[word:shozathafshaf|shozathafshaf]] || [[word:shozathafkaf|shozathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shozathasha|shozathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozathshĂ«asha|shozathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozathroasha|shozathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozathmuasha|shozathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozathyaasha|shozathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozathnkshĂ«asha|goshozathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozathnkroasha|goshozathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozathnkmuasha|goshozathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozathnkyaasha|goshozathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shozazathasha|shozazathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozazathshĂ«asha|shozazathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozazathroasha|shozazathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozazathmuasha|shozazathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozazathyaasha|shozazathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozazathnkshĂ«asha|goshozazathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozazathnkroasha|goshozazathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozazathnkmuasha|goshozazathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozazathnkyaasha|goshozazathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shezĂŠthasha|shezĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shezĂŠthshĂ«asha|shezĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shezĂŠthroasha|shezĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shezĂŠthmuasha|shezĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shezĂŠthyaasha|shezĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshezĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|goshezĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshezĂŠthnkroasha|goshezĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshezĂŠthnkmuasha|goshezĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshezĂŠthnkyaasha|goshezĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shozfathasha|shozfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozfathshĂ«asha|shozfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozfathroasha|shozfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozfathmuasha|shozfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozfathyaasha|shozfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozfathnkshĂ«asha|goshozfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozfathnkroasha|goshozfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozfathnkmuasha|goshozfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozfathnkyaasha|goshozfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
